docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files. Bonjour ceci est un test Adressage IP - Chartres : 172.28.32-63.0 /19 - Tours : 172.28.64-95.0 /19 - Orléans : 172.28.96-127.0 /19 - Bourges : 172.28.128-159.0 /19 - Blois : 172.28.160.0 /19 - Nutomix : 172.16.90.200 : 9440 Tableau d'adresse | Equipement | réseaux | adresse ip | |-------------------------------------------------------| | TRS-Switch-core 192.168.130.0 /27 192.18.130.30 |
